overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through urban streets. The player character walks past a neon-lit hotel and pawnshop, turns a corner at an intersection, and continues along a street affected by an orange sandstorm haze with palm trees and pedestrians visible.

tropical palm tree fronds visible in the fog
tall street light pole casting bright light through the fog
wooden bench structure on the sidewalk
illuminated PAWNSHOP sign on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy city sidewalk at night, passing by a hotel with bright neon signage. The street is empty of pedestrians with only occasional vehicles passing by on the left. A palm tree and wooden bench are visible through the mist.

events.description: turns right at the corner to navigate the intersection
vehicles pass through the foggy intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right at the street corner and proceeding across the intersection area

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the foggy intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the corner into a more open intersection. The hotel and pawnshop recede behind as vehicles pass through the crossing. The street lamp moves to the left and fades into the distance as the camera navigates the turn.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandstorm-affected urban street with palm trees

events.description: atmospheric lighting shifts to orange sandstorm haze

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk through the orange-tinted sandstorm, approaching other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the right side of the street
contemporary building with horizontal illuminated window strips
series of tall street lamps along the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along a new street bathed in orange sandstorm light. Palm trees and a modern building line the right side while pedestrians walk ahead and pass by. The atmosphere is thick with particulate haze, reducing visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy urban night that gradually transitions into a thick, orange sandstorm haze. It begins by moving along a misty sidewalk past a hotel with bright neon signage, where a lone palm tree and wooden bench emerge from the gloom. As the camera reaches a corner, it turns right into an open intersection, leaving the hotel and a nearby pawnshop behind while vehicles pass through the crossing. The scene then shifts as the camera proceeds down a new street, where the cool night fog is replaced by a dense, particulate orange glow. Finally, the view opens up to reveal pedestrians and modern buildings lining the path under the heavy atmospheric haze of the sandstorm.
